message:
test(mission): add thread-id edge cases and serde roundtrips for agent mail kernel

Add 9 tests for mission_agent_mail coordination types:

- canonical_thread_id: explicit override, whitespace trimming,
  empty/whitespace falls back to derived, fleet+bead inclusion,
  mission-only derivation
- Serde roundtrips: CoordinationEventKind (all 5 variants),
  MissionAgentMailConfig, MissionCoordinationContext (with optionals)
- MissionAgentMailConfig::default() positive ack_timeout_ms

Total mission_agent_mail tests: 20 (was 11).

Build: --no-default-features --features subprocess-bridge
All 20 pass (0.01s).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
